rows.label: qev050502_MSG0007
rows.name:
What's with this guy... He's scary...
Just what is his objective...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Could you please stop just listening to whatever he says
and report him to the proper authorities?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0002
rows.name:
It seems like he's just making threats and hasn't actually done anything,
but still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0003
rows.name: If he pulls out a sword or something, I won't be able to handle it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0004
rows.name:
This person... he doesn't seem like a bad guy, right?
If you just get a recipe, I'll teach him how to cook.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0005
rows.name:
So please, lend an ear to the people of the city
and walk around a bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0006
rows.name:
There are plenty of cooking enthusiasts in NLA, too.
I'm sure there's someone out there with a recipe they're proud of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ingredients for curry, huh...
Let's see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Add some Aged Suid Fatty Meat dropped by a Suid,
and I think we can make something decent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050502_MSG0011
rows.name:
It seems like you've been asked to do a lot of things,
and it looks tough, but... do your best, alright?[ST:wait ]
